name: Almond Crush Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine all ingredients except almonds. Blend well with a mixer.
2. Stir in the chopped almonds and mix thoroughly.
3. Chill for several hours.
4. Shape the dough into balls.
5. Place on an ungreased cookie sheet.
6. Bake at 400°F for 8-10 minutes.
7. Cool.
